save_password_warning: Save this password now - it won't be shown again:
no_webdav_accounts_desc: Create one to connect via WebDAV.
webdav_page_desc: Create dedicated WebDAV credentials for Finder, File Explorer, and third-party clients.
webdav_accounts_list_desc: Create, enable, disable, or remove existing WebDAV accounts.
webdav_recent_credentials_desc: These credentials are only shown once. Save them now and test the connection.
webdav_scope_all_desc: This account can access the entire drive.
webdav_scope_folder_desc: This account can only access the selected folder and its descendants.
webdav_no_root_folders: There are no root folders available for scoped access yet.
webdav_connection_tips_desc: Use the following details in Finder, Windows File Explorer, or any WebDAV client.
webdav_use_credentials_hint: Sign in with the dedicated WebDAV username and password instead of reusing your main account password.
webdav_test_hint: Test the connection right after creating the account to confirm the client can sign in.
